text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text: The Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
That vaunted name has given us countless
legends who made their mark on the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text: Mejiro McQueen, Mejiro Ryan...

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Palmer, and many more.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Their running is still fresh in the minds of fans,
who continue to be drawn to them.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Today, we look back on the history of the Mejiro
family, featuring footage from never-before-seen
interviews.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Fans have been eagerly awaiting the rise of a new
Mejiro racer...
choice_data_list: The rise of a new Mejiro racer, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, my journey with Mejiro Dober to take on
the Twinkle Series begins!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's going to need to work harder than ever if
she's to become the rising star the world is
anticipating.
choice_data_list:
First things first, we need to discuss our plan
going forward!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go to the training course to look for Mejiro
Dober, and when I get there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. Should be all warmed up now.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student A
text_block_list.text: Wow! It's Mejiro Dober! She's as cool as ever! ♪

text_block_list.name: Younger Student B
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't expect anything less from a Mejiro.
They just have this aura about them...

text_block_list.name: Younger Student A
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait for her debut race. I bet it's gonna be
awesome! I wanna go watch it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is attracting attention from the
younger students. It looks like expectations are
high within the academy as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, having this many eyes on her might make her
nervous. I have to do something before she gets
unnerved.
choice_data_list: Dober! Sorry to keep you waiting!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer?! Don't just suddenly shout my name!
And it's not like I was waiting for you...
choice_data_list:
There are a lot of people here. Let's go talk
elsewhere.

There are a lot of people here. Let's go talk
elsewhere.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. No worries, I just got here.
choice_data_list:
There are a lot of people here. Let's go talk
elsewhere.

There are a lot of people here. Let's go talk
elsewhere.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...O-okay.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Sure. Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once we're away from the crowd, I tell her I want
to talk about plans for her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once we're away from the crowd, I tell her I want
to talk about plans for her debut.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wait, before we start... You were trying to help
me back there, weren't you? ...Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for helping me back there. I was honestly
feeling kind of flustered, so I appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Actually, your timing works out. I wanted to talk
to you about my debut as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Actually, your timing works out. I wanted to talk
to you about my debut as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to be able to run properly, to become a
racer strong enough to run with confidence at all
times.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And I want to start by putting everything I've got
into my debut race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I'm just stating the obvious. I wasn't fishing for
compliments.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I-is it? All I did was state the obvious. You don't
have to flatter me, you know...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, um, I just wanted to make my intentions
clear, so... Let's make it happen.
choice_data_list: I'm looking forward to working with you!
I'm looking forward to working with you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, um, I just wanted to make my intentions
clear, so... Let's make it happen.
choice_data_list: I'm looking forward to working with you!
I'm looking forward to working with you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sure. Anyway, about my training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Same here. Anyway, about my training...
Dober!
Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff! I've been looking all over for you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bright, a ladylike and laid-back peer of Dober's
and a fellow Mejiro, runs up to us, waving.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: There's a—eep!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student A
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Bright! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student B
text_block_list.text:
That clumsy side of her just makes me wanna
protect her! It's so adorable!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student A
text_block_list.text:
I totally understand. I kinda feel bad, but seeing
her like this brings a smile to my face...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, dear. My legs seem to have gotten all
tangled up. This is no good. No good at all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
What's this? Everyone seems to be looking at
me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Good day, everyone! It's another wonderful day
for training, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! Bright!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright carries herself with a self-possessed
calm as she addresses the younger students.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Some things never change...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, Dober. Apologies for interrupting your
training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
G-greetings. We haven't actually started yet, so
it's no bother. Was there something you wanted
to talk about?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Since we're in the same year, I thought I'd come
to give my salutations and cheer you on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
As racers of the Mejiro family, let us forge
through the Twinkle Series together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course. Let's work hard together, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Motivated by Bright's words, Mejiro Dober seems
more determined. I have to take advantage of
this.
choice_data_list:
Why not take this chance to do some partner
running?

Why not take this chance to do some partner
running?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What? Now? I'm sure Bright has her own
training—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, what a fabulous idea. I've already finished
warming up, so why don't we start right away?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, of course. I love running with you, Dober.
That said...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Don't think I'll allow you to take the lead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, unfortunately for you, I don't plan on
letting you run ahead of me either!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff! Puff! Huff!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two sprint off under the clear sky, their every
step filled with drive. It's clear how much
motivation they derive from each other.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student A
text_block_list.text: Whoa! They're really going at it!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student B
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to see how they do after their debut.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe! They look like they're having loads of fun!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Seems they're well prepared for their debut.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Hehe. I didn't expect anything less from you, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Whew... You did great too, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell Mejiro Dober and Mejiro Bright are
going to become great rivals for each other!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Let's keep it up going into our debut.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Right. I'll work hard so I can run at my absolute
best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I resolve to work hard too in order to make her
powerful words come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus begin my days of fighting alongside Mejiro
Dober!
